meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Overcoming Project Stagnation for Devs
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance projects. Learn to use Antigravity and Claude Code to streamline pitching, ship faster, and scale your development workflow today.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of defined scope and technical friction. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for automated implementation, you move from manual coding to architecture oversight. Pitch focused, high-value MVPs, automate the boilerplate, and deliver professional-grade software in record time.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a half-finished repo, the client deadline is looming, and your motivation has evaporated. We’ve all been there—the 'middle-of-the-project' slump where scope creep meets technical debt. You aren't failing because you lack skill; you're failing because your workflow is manual and your pitching process lacks the structural clarity needed to guarantee a clean finish.

The secret isn't working harder; it's engineering your pitch to be 'build-ready' from day one. By leveraging AI-first tooling, you shift from being a code monkey to an architect, ensuring every project you pitch is scoped for speed and modular success.

steps.title: Define the High-Value MVP Scope
steps.description: Before pitching, use Antigravity to generate a strict, modular feature set. This prevents scope creep before it starts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project brief and generate a modular feature breakdown that prioritizes core functionality and identifies potential scope creep risks for a freelance client.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a project spec file based on this feature list'

steps.title: Architect the Tech Stack for Speed
steps.description: Select tools that allow for rapid iteration. We focus on frameworks that minimize boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a tech stack optimized for rapid freelance delivery, focusing on Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind, ensuring modularity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project repo with selected stack and best practices'

steps.title: Automate the Project Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Claude Code to establish the file structure immediately. Don't spend hours on setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a file structure map for a SaaS MVP including Auth, Database, and UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create folders and starter files based on the architecture map'

steps.title: Implement Core Logic via AI Agents
steps.description: Use Claude Code to handle repetitive CRUD operations and API integrations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, reusable API route handler for user authentication and data persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement the API handler and write unit tests for the auth flow'

steps.title: Final QA and Client Handoff
steps.description: Automate the generation of documentation and final polish to impress the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional README and a technical documentation guide for the client to maintain the project.

pro_tips: Always pitch a 'Version 0.5' phase to the client to ensure you hit a shipping milestone within 14 days.
Use Claude Code to write tests before the code; it forces the model to understand the logic requirements first.
Keep your Antigravity prompts centered on modularity; if a feature isn't a separate module, it's a liability.
Never hand over raw code; use AI to generate clean, human-readable documentation that builds your authority.
Automate your git commit messages using Claude Code to keep your history clean and professional for client audits.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project backlog and applying the MVP scope method to the most stagnant project.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting projects die in the draft phase. Use the power of AI to standardize your workflow, impress your clients, and reclaim your time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
